rooms.title: The Smoldering Maw
rooms.description: The air grows heavy and thick with sulfur. Heat radiates from the basalt walls as jagged obsidian stalactites hang precariously overhead. A faint red glow pulses from the tunnel ahead.

rooms.title: The Altar of Ash
rooms.description: A massive cavern opens up. In the center sits a monolithic stone altar slick with fresh blood. Ash-cultists kneel in a semi-circle, their low chanting echoing off the cavernous ceiling.

rooms.title: Ignis's Lava Throne
rooms.description: You breach the final archway and step onto a narrow stone bridge spanning a churning sea of molten magma. Resting on a massive rock pillar in the center of the lake is Ignis, the Red Tyrant. Her golden eyes lock onto you as she unfurls her wings.
